completed_tasks.name: Research: 4 parallel researchers (STACK, FEATURES, ARCHITECTURE, PITFALLS)

decisions.decision: Browser automation (agent-browser) over Microsoft Graph API
decisions.rationale: User preference; avoids Azure app registration
User's company uses custom domain (e.g. mail.example.com)
User's use case is work email; personal account support deferred to v2

decisions.decision: Strictly read-only enforced at browser layer (Action Policy)
Single outlook.js entry point with subcommands
decisions.rationale: Auth check is shared infrastructure; splitting would mean 3x session checks

decisions.decision: JSON to stdout with standard envelope
decisions.rationale: Personal assistant Claude Code instance parses it directly

next_action: Present requirements list to user for approval. Ask: 'Does this capture what you're building? (yes / adjust)'. Then commit REQUIREMENTS.md and spawn gsd-roadmapper agent.
context_notes: We are mid-flow in /gsd-new-project. Requirements have been written based on research findings. The user's key constraint is a configurable base URL for their company's Outlook domain. The 5-phase structure (auth → search → read → digest → hardening) is well-supported by research. Bot detection (Microsoft fingerprinting) is the top risk and is addressed in Phase 1. REQUIREMENTS.md is written but NOT yet committed — must get user approval first.
